prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens with an extreme close-up of a fly- or mosquito-like insect. Its compound eyes, antennae, legs, and blurred wings fill the frame under purple-blue lighting.

It cuts to a living room: a teenage boy sits centered on a couch, facing a television in the foreground. He appears focused upward toward the screen. Around him are pillows, a plaid blanket, papers, and snack packaging. The room is dimly lit with a cool, bluish cast.

The ad then returns to macro insect imagery: the insect’s face is shown head-on, with its long proboscis extending toward the camera. A later side view shows the insect standing on a textured, hairy surface that appears to be skin, with its proboscis positioned against it.

The sequence briefly switches to video-game footage. One shot shows a fighting-game-style scene with large statue-like figures in the background and an on-screen rating box marked “MA-13.” Another set of shots shows a basketball video game: a player jumps near the hoop, defenders stand below, and a crowd fills the background. A rating box marked “GA” appears, and small text at the bottom indicates that Sega Genesis game screens are being shown.

The insect close-ups continue. One shot shows the insect from the side with a swollen reddish-orange abdomen while it remains on the hairy skin surface, lit dramatically from behind in purple light.

The boy is then shown in a tight close-up from above. A small insect is visibly on the center of his forehead while his eyes roll upward toward it. Immediately after, a white cylindrical object with a crossword- or grid-like design and red handwritten letters moves down in front of his face, partly obscuring him.

The commercial cuts to a white background where the word “SEGA” appears in thick, dark red, liquid-like lettering with splatters around it. The letters fill the frame and then settle into a clearer full wordmark.

The final sampled frame returns to the insect on the hairy skin surface. It appears sprawled or distorted against the surface, still lit with the same purple-toned, high-contrast macro style.
